title: Don Juan's 3 Nights
writer: Lajos Biró, Clara Beranger, Gerald C. Duffy
actors: Lewis Stone, Shirley Mason, Malcolm McGregor
plot: Johann Aridi, famous pianist and noted lover, finds that Ninette Cavallar, daughter of his hostess, has fallen in love with him, he welcomes the chance for yet another boudoir-conquest until he discovers she is only sixteen-years-...
